productDisplayName: Fila Men Dls Maxim Silver Sports Shoes
description: Designed for those who enjoy those long healthy runs and walks, the DLS Maxim from fila combines comfort and stability at its best. With a heavily meshed upper and great ergonomic construction, this is one classic running shoe.UpperHeavily meshed upper and inner bootie for ultimate ventilation and fresh comfort to the feetStrategically placed synthetic overlays for enhanced shoe structureLace-up system for a snug, customized FitMeshed and padded tongue and collar for snug, all-day comfortPadded footbed for all-day comfortMidsolePhylon midsole for lightweight comfort and shock absorptionOutsoleTPR outsole for durability Flex grooves in the forefoot for ease of movementMulti-directional grooves for absolute grip and traction on various surfacesImpact guidance system for equal distribution of shock, resulting in better energy returnDecoupled scooped heel for absolute cushioned comfort and impact protection to the heel and anklesShoe careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
